description: Identify utility points from the loaded survey dataset foothills_street_utilities.csv in TopoCal. Create a CAD layer named UTILITIES-POLE and draw circles with a 0.50 meter radius centered on Utility Pole points (Code: 'UP', Points 15, 22, 38, and 45). Create a CAD layer named UTILITIES-WATER and draw circles with a 0.75 meter radius centered on Fire Hydrant points (Code: 'FH', Points 12, 29, and 50). Export the resulting CAD drawing to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\utility_symbols.dxf.
